OpenSearchDescription:
{{instance}} {{instance}} {{_('Calibre-Web NextGen eBook Catalog')}} CrocodileStick https://github.com/crocodilestick/calibre-web-automated {#- Fork issue #160: the search templates are rendered as OpenSearch URL templates with literal ``{searchTerms}`` markers. url_for produces ``/opds/search`` (potentially with ``?lang=xx`` appended via ``url_defaults``), so we can't naively suffix with ``/{searchTerms}`` or ``?query={searchTerms}`` — the path-form would collide with the query string and the query-form would produce ``?lang=xx?query=...``. The opds_search_url_path() helper and search_url_atom value are built in cps/opds.py with the search marker inserted correctly. -#}
open {{lang}} UTF-8 UTF-8
